name: evolver-tools
description: 239 CLI tools + 9 flagship projects — one pip install

pricing_model.free: All 239 tools + 9 flagship — fully open source (MIT)

new_in_v33: diff-yaml — Show differences between two YAML files (unified/compact/raw)
hexdec — Convert between hex, decimal, octal, binary (auto-detect)
csv-pretty — Pretty-print CSV files as aligned tables (unicode/ascii/markdown)
humanize — Convert raw numbers to human-readable format (size/duration/count)
cron-check — Validate and describe cron expressions (describe/next/validate)
features: 9 flagship projects (500-1700 lines each, CLI+TUI dual mode)
Zero external dependencies across all tools
Single pip install — no version conflicts
